label: Cat EV Tracker
info:
Tracks Laban and Minoes via the SurePetcare API and represents them as virtual EVs on VRM.

Setup:
1. Configure the surepetcare-config node with your credentials
2. Enter each cat's microchip ID as the VIN in the two victron-virtual nodes
3. Set a custom display name for each EV in VRM

name: Cat EV State Machine
